A view of the Eiffel Tower with the Olympic rings displayed on it. Paris, France, July 21, 2024. /CFP

At the invitation of the host country, France and the International Olympic Committee, Chinese Vice President Han Zheng will travel to Paris as President Xi Jinping's Special Representative to attend the Opening Ceremony and other events of the 33rd Olympic Games in Paris on July 26.

title: Chinese VP Han Zheng to attend Opening Ceremony of Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: At the invitation of the host country, France and the International Olympic Committee, Chinese Vice President Han Zheng will travel to Paris as President Xi Jinping's Special Representative to attend the Opening Ceremony and other events of the 33rd
